package rulecoverage

func PositiveLoadhtmlglobOrLoadhtmlfilesInRequestPath() string {
    ruleID := "loadhtmlglob_or_loadhtmlfiles_in_request_path"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "LoadHTMLGlob or LoadHTMLFiles called on request paths instead of startup initialization."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
